[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0010001011 4
1 0000000000 a
2 0000000000 a
3 0000000000 a
4 0111011000 5
5 0100001110 4
6 0001010100 3
7 1011001100 5

01 10 0100001000 2
12 21 0000000100 1
23 32 0001000100 2

45 54 0001010000 2
56 65 1001000100 3
67 76 1000000100 2
70 07 0010001000 2

13 31 0000001100 2
24 42 0001010000 2
35 53 1001000100 3
46 64 0001000000 1

60 06 0001000000 1
71 17 0000001110 3

14 41 0000001010 2
25 52 0001010100 3 match 6
36 63 1001000100 3
47 74 0010001011 4 match 0
50 05 0001010000 2
61 16 0000000100 1
72 27 0000000100 1

26 62 0001000100 2
